verificationNote: Primary official source: Xinhua (english.news.cn) published 'Mankind creates first global intergovernmental AI cooperation organization' on 2026-07-17T11:58:18+00:00 (displayed date 2026-07-17). Confirms WAICO founding by 29 countries, HQ Shanghai, announced at WAIC. Event and exact date verified.
title: China launches WAICO global AI governance body
summary: Twenty-nine countries signed a founding agreement on July 16-17, 2026 establishing the World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization (WAICO), the first intergovernmental AI body, headquartered in Shanghai. Chinese President Xi Jinping announced the creation at WAIC 2026, framing it as a milestone for Global South participation in AI governance and development.

impactAnalysis.summary: Twenty-nine countries signed the founding agreement for the World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization (WAICO), headquartered in Shanghai and announced by Xi Jinping at WAIC. WAICO is the first China-led permanent multilateral AI governance institution and directly challenges US- and EU-centric forums such as the GPAI and the OECD AI framework. Its membership breadth and institutional permanence make it a structural shift in global AI diplomacy.
